metadata.description: Three Cursor marketplace plugins for the umbraculum-dev apparatus: common meta-framework rules, generic Node/TypeScript/React assistant, and umbraculum-platform TS/JS foundation-hardening assistant. Install all three together for umbraculum-dev. OpenPLC plugin remains hook-only in this repo until its sister repo is public (not listed here).

plugins.name: umbraculum-toolset-common
plugins.description: Common meta-framework rules + skills shared by the umbraculum-toolset Cursor plugins. Install alongside umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant and/or umbraculum-platform-tsjs-cursor-assistant for umbraculum-dev (all three required).

plugins.name: umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant
plugins.description: Generic Node/TypeScript/React/E2E Cursor assistant with rules, skills, and agents. Suitable for any TS/JS project (the umbraculum- brand prefix is for marketplace name-uniqueness, not because the plugin is umbraculum-specific). Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common.

plugins.name: umbraculum-platform-tsjs-cursor-assistant
plugins.description: Umbraculum-platform-specific Cursor assistant for the TS/JS half of the platform: encodes the four-slice foundation-hardening discipline (lint + types + tests + docs) and the multi-tenant workspace-scoped architectural patterns used in umbraculum-dev. Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common and umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant.
